releaseNotes:
v1.3.5: Source recovery engine — final sweep before TV Static

SourceRecoveryEngine runs a 4-step recovery sweep before declaring
ALL_SOURCES_EXHAUSTED:
 1. Cached streams for untried source types
 2. Previously-good source from persistent health memory
 3. Re-resolve dynamic tokens (DLHD fresh JWT, World TV extraction)
 4. Health-based pick from ChannelHealthEngine history

Cooldown tracking: 30s/60s/120s escalating after 2/5/10 failures.

Integrated into both playback engines:
- TVPlaybackActivity.tryNextSource(): recovery sweep before UNAVAILABLE
- TVPlaybackActivity.staticRetryFire(): recovery picks alternate source
- PlayerViewModel.advanceToNextSource(): recovery before showStatic
- playNextUrl()/onPlayerError(): recovery via advanceToNextSource
